---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

::: {.lecture-list}
### Robotics Software Architecture {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 01: Physics Simulation](01-physics-simulation.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 02: LCM-Based Communication and Control](02-lcm-based-communication-and-control.qmd)<br>

### Robot Modeling, Planning, and Control {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 03: Gravity Compensation](03-gravity-compensation.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 04: Robot Collision Geometry Modeling](04-robot-collision-geometry-modeling.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 05: Artificial Potential Fields](05-artificial-potential-fields.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 06: Motion Planning and Trajectory Tracking](06-motion-planning-and-trajectory-tracking.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 07: Operational Space Impedance Control](07-operational-space-impedance-control.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 08: Velocity Field Control](08-velocity-field-control.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 09: Task-Space Control via Quadratic Programming](09-task-space-control-via-quadratic-programming.qmd)<br>

### System Identification and Compensation {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 10: Friction Coefficient Identification](10-friction-coefficient-identification.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 11: Friction Compensation](11-friction-compensation.qmd)<br>

### Sensing and Perception {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 12: Camera Calibration](12-camera-calibration.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 13: Visual Servoing](13-visual-servoing.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 14: Robotic Grasping](14-robotic-grasping.qmd)<br>
:::
